hero.heading: Transmission Experts You Can Trust
hero.subheading: Family-owned and proudly serving Burbank with a perfect 5-star rating. From rebuilds to diagnostics, Crabtree Automatics keeps you moving.

about.heading: Burbank's Transmission Authority
paragraphs: Crabtree Automatics has earned its reputation as one of Burbank's most trusted transmission and auto repair shops. With a perfect 5-star rating across dozens of reviews, we deliver the kind of honest, skilled work that keeps customers coming back — and sending their friends.

Our technicians specialize in automatic and manual transmission repair, rebuilds, and diagnostics. We combine decades of hands-on experience with modern equipment to diagnose problems accurately and fix them right the first time.

Located on Magnolia Boulevard in the heart of Burbank, we treat every vehicle like it's our own. No upsells, no surprises — just straightforward service from a team that takes pride in getting you back on the road safely.

services.title: Transmission Repair
services.description: Expert diagnosis and repair for automatic and manual transmissions. We pinpoint the issue and fix it without unnecessary work.

services.title: Transmission Rebuild
services.description: Complete transmission rebuilds using quality parts and precise tolerances. Restored to factory spec or better.

services.title: Transmission Diagnostics
services.description: Advanced electronic and mechanical diagnostics to identify shifting problems, leaks, slipping, and unusual noises.

services.title: Fluid Service & Flush
services.description: Transmission fluid changes and flushes to extend the life of your transmission and prevent costly failures.

services.title: Clutch Repair & Replacement
services.description: Manual transmission clutch service including inspection, adjustment, and full replacement when needed.

services.title: General Auto Repair
services.description: Beyond transmissions — we handle brakes, engine diagnostics, cooling systems, and general maintenance to keep your vehicle running strong.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Best transmission shop in Burbank, hands down. They rebuilt my transmission and it shifts better than when I bought the car. Honest pricing and fast turnaround.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: I was quoted $4,000 at the dealer. Crabtree fixed the actual problem for a fraction of that. These guys know transmissions inside and out.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Brought my truck in with a hard shift issue. They diagnosed it same day and had it fixed by the next afternoon. Fair price, great communication.

reviews.name: Sandra M.
reviews.text: I've been bringing my cars here for years. They never try to sell me things I don't need. Trustworthy and skilled — rare combination.

reviews.name: Kevin P.
reviews.text: My transmission was slipping badly and I thought I needed a full rebuild. Turns out it was a solenoid issue. They saved me thousands by being honest. Will never go anywhere else.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Crabtree Automatics, 4307 W Magnolia Blvd, Burbank, CA 91505

faq.question: How do I know if my transmission needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include delayed or rough shifting, slipping between gears, transmission fluid leaks, grinding or shaking, and a burning smell. If you notice any of these, bring it in for a free diagnostic check before small issues become big ones.

faq.question: How long does a transmission rebuild take?
faq.answer: Most transmission rebuilds take 2 to 4 business days depending on the vehicle and parts availability. We'll give you a clear timeline upfront so you can plan ahead.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on transmission work?
faq.answer: Yes. All transmission rebuilds and major repairs come with a warranty. We stand behind our work because we use quality parts and take the time to do it right.

faq.question: Is it worth rebuilding a transmission or should I replace it?
faq.answer: In most cases, a rebuild is more cost-effective and gives you a transmission that's been inspected part by part. We'll give you an honest assessment of which option makes the most sense for your vehicle and budget.

faq.question: Do you work on all vehicle makes and models?
faq.answer: We service most domestic and foreign vehicles — cars, trucks, and SUVs. Whether it's a daily driver or a work truck, we have the experience and equipment to handle it.

seo.title: Crabtree Automatics — Burbank Transmission Repair & Rebuild Specialists
seo.description: 5-star rated transmission repair shop in Burbank, CA. Expert rebuilds, diagnostics, clutch repair, and general auto service. Honest pricing, trusted results.
